    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    U

    updateList(List<CancelledEntrantsActivity.CancelledEntrant>) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsAdapter
    Replaces the current list with a new one and refreshes the RecyclerView.
    updateList(List<InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant>) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    Replaces the current entrant list and triggers a full rebind.
    User - Class in com.example.codebase
    Represents a user in the Timely Event Lottery System.
    User() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.User
    Default constructor required for Firebase Firestore serialization.
    User(String) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.User
    Constructs a new User with the specified device ID.
    UserRepository - Class in com.example.codebase
    Repository class responsible for Firestore user profile operations.
    UserRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.UserRepository
     
    UserRepository.ErrorCallback - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Callback interface for operations that only need to report failure.
    UserRepository.UserCallback - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Callback interface for operations that return a single User.
    usersRef - Variable in class com.example.codebase.AppDatabase
    Reference to the users Firestore collection.
